hero.title: Surveying and Civil 3D tools for quality of life.
hero.body: Suite installers for legacy AutoCAD / Land Desktop workflows and modern Civil 3D setups. Apps and scripts made to streamline workflows and promote backwards compatibility.

suites.name: GB Tools Suite 2000
suites.subtitle: AutoCAD / Land Desktop 2000
suites.description: Installer package for old-school production machines that need reliable LISP/VBA utilities and DXF-based workflows.

suites.name: GB Tools Suite 2027
suites.subtitle: Civil 3D / AutoCAD 2027
suites.description: Installer package for modern Civil 3D workflows using .NET tools, LISP helpers, and bundle-style deployment.

standalonePanel.title: Available standalone downloads
standalonePanel.description: Individual installers and scripts stay on the standalone catalog for now. Standalone downloads will be merged to this site in the future.

rows.name: Any2DXF
rows.description: Point import and DXF export for legacy and modern CAD workflows.

rows.name: Least Squares Adjustment
rows.description: Move and rotate selected CAD objects to match control points.

rows.name: More .lsp scripts
rows.description: QOL LISP scripts for CAD supporting .lsp.

adminSection.title: Note:
adminSection.caption: please be advised
adminSection.note: This is the only website providing these programs. Downloads from other sites may contain malicious software.
